---
title: "Amanda Tan"
image: "files/IMG_1311.JPG"
about:
    template: jolla
    links:
        - icon: envelope
          href: mailto:a6tan@ucsd.edu
        - icon: linkedin
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/aamandatan/
---

Hi, I'm Amanda! I'm an MSBA student at UC San Diego, graduating in June 2026.

I grew up in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia 🇲🇾 and made my way to San Diego to pursue a career at the intersection of data and brand storytelling. I'm passionate about using analytics to understand consumer behavior, drive marketing strategy, and build brands that people genuinely love.

My ultimate goal is to work as a **Marketing Analyst** for a luxury beauty or fashion house — think LVMH: Dior, Sephora, Fenty, Givenchy. I'm drawn to brands that blend creativity with precision, and I believe great marketing decisions start with great data.

Outside of work, you'll find me testing new skincare routines, keeping up with runway season, and hunting for the best matcha latte in whatever city I'm in.

**Currently open to:** Full-time marketing analytics roles starting Summer/Fall 2026.
